tool.name: trello_bulk_move_cards
tool.description: Move multiple Trello cards to a target list in parallel using concurrent browser tabs. Use this instead of calling trello_move_card multiple times. Pass card IDs as a comma-separated string.

parameters.name: card_ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated Trello card IDs to move

parameters.name: target_list_id
parameters.description: Target list ID to move all cards to
